2603.19515.title: ItinBench: Benchmarking Planning Across Multiple Cognitive Dimensions with Large Language Models
2603.19515.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) with advanced cognitive capabilities are emerging as agents for various reasoning and planning tasks. Traditional evaluations often focus on specific reasoning or planning questions within controlled environments. Recent studies have explored travel planning as a medium to integrate various verbal reasoning tasks into real-world contexts. However, reasoning tasks extend beyond verbal reasoning alone, and a comprehensive evaluation of LLMs requires a testbed that incorporates tasks from multiple cognitive domains. To address this gap, we introduce ItinBench, a benchmark that features one task of spatial reasoning, i.e., route optimization, into trip itinerary planning while keeping the traditional verbal reasoning tasks. ItinBench evaluates various LLMs across diverse tasks simultaneously, including Llama 3.1 8B, Mistral Large, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and GPT family. Our findings reveal that LLMs struggle to maintain high and consistent performance when concurrently handling multiple cognitive dimensions. By incorporating tasks from distinct human-level cognitive domains, ItinBench provides new insights into building more comprehensive reasoning testbeds that better reflect real-world challenges. The code and dataset: https://ethanwtl.github.io/IBweb/
2603.19515.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）具備先進的認知能力，正逐漸成為各種推理和規劃任務的代理人。傳統評估通常專注於受控環境中的特定推理或規劃問題。最近的研究探討了旅行規劃作為一種媒介，將各種語言推理任務整合到現實世界的情境中。然而，推理任務不僅僅限於語言推理，對LLMs的全面評估需要一個包含多個認知領域任務的測試平台。為了解決這一空白，我們推出了ItinBench，這是一個基準，將一項空間推理任務，即路徑優化，融入旅行行程規劃，同時保留傳統的語言推理任務。ItinBench同時評估各種LLMs在不同任務上的表現，包括Llama 3.1 8B、Mistral Large、Gemini 1.5 Pro和GPT系列。我們的研究發現，LLMs在同時處理多個認知維度時，難以保持高且一致的表現。通過整合來自不同人類認知領域的任務，ItinBench提供了對構建更全面的推理測試平台的新見解，這些平台能更好地反映現實世界的挑戰。代碼和數據集：https://ethanwtl.github.io/IBweb/
2603.19515.author: Tianlong Wang et.al.
2603.19515.authors: Tianlong Wang, Pinqiao Wang, Weili Shi, Sheng li
